tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Playwright test file produces valid, complete documentation output with at least one named test entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system successfully processes the uploaded file and displays results to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test case is documented from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright test using test.each is expanded into individual test entries — one per data row — in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system successfully processes the data-driven test file and displays results

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 2 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row in test.each produces its own distinct test entry in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is identifiable by a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright test using a for...of loop is expanded into individual test entries — one per iteration — in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system successfully processes the for...of test file and displays results

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each iteration of the for...of loop produces its own distinct test entry in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is identifiable by a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Playwright test file in QA Manager mode produces documentation that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system successfully processes the uploaded file and displays results to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test case is documented from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a meaningful name

test_coverage.verification_step: The first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright test using test.each is collapsed into a single test entry in QA Manager mode, with coverage matrix rows representing each data scenario.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system successfully processes the data-driven test file and displays results

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has exactly 1 test
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All data rows from test.each are collapsed into a single test entry rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test is identifiable by a meaningful name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from test.each is represented as its own row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected Playwright-specific structure

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright test using a for...of loop is collapsed into a single test entry in QA Manager mode, with coverage matrix rows representing each iteration.
